---
name: Attack rule request
about: Suggest a new attack rule or detection
labels: rule-request

**Attack class**
<!-- e.g., A2A Push Notification SSRF, MCP OAuth Scope Escalation -->

**Protocol**
- [ ] A2A
- [ ] MCP
- [ ] Both

**Description of the attack**
<!-- How does the attack work? Link to any relevant research, CVEs, or PoCs. -->

**Expected detection**
<!-- What observable behavior indicates the vulnerability is present? -->

**References**
<!-- Papers, CVEs, blog posts, PoC code -->
